summary: Comprehensive testing of Sales Management App v21 - All major features verified working. Backend: 22/22 tests pass. Frontend: All key flows tested including login, dashboard KPIs, category toggle, status tabs, earnings, pipeline, notifications, commission rules admin panel, sale conversion modal with confetti. Fixed Under Book rule bug for self_gen SPIFF.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 x -1) - minor recharts rendering issue

seed_data_creation: Converted CHRIS LLORENCE lead to SALE ($15,000) during confetti test
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. All features tested: Login (3 users), Dashboard (HVAC/Generator toggle, KPIs, accessory sell-through), Status tab (All Leads with customer #, Pipeline book cards, Tasks), Earnings (Commission Tiers, SPIFF Breakdown, Quarterly Self Gen Mits $3,092), SaleConversionModal (5 tiers, 7 SPIFFs, Under Book rule, custom SPIFFs, paid accessory, confetti), Notifications (dismiss, clear all), Pipeline templates (add/remove steps), Add Interaction (type, voice, translate), Admin Commission Rules panel. Fixed: Under Book rule now correctly keeps self_gen SPIFF unlocked (line 224 in SaleConversionModal.jsx).

features_verified.login: ✓ Benjamin, Franco (salesperson), Admin all login correctly
features_verified.dashboard_hvac: ✓ Shows R% 39%, $348,850 revenue, 77 leads, 30 closed for Benjamin
features_verified.dashboard_generator: ✓ Category toggle works, shows green theme, 1 lead, $0 for Benjamin
features_verified.accessory_sellthrough: ✓ APCO X 27%, Duct Cleaning 13%, Surge Protector 13%, Paid Accessory 0%
features_verified.status_tab_all_leads: ✓ Customer # visible, status filters, Call/SMS/Email/Pipeline actions
features_verified.pipeline_view: ✓ Book-style cards, Closing Flow button, action buttons, progress bars
features_verified.earnings_tab: ✓ 27 installations, $35,944.80 commission, commission tiers with progress bars
features_verified.spiff_breakdown: ✓ APCO X, Samsung, Surge, Duct, Mitsubishi with clickable cards
features_verified.sale_conversion_modal: ✓ 5 tiers (5/7/8/9/10%), 7 SPIFFs including self_gen 3%, custom SPIFFs, paid accessory
features_verified.under_book_rule: ✓ Fixed - locks APCO X, Surge, Duct but keeps Samsung, Self Gen Mits, Self Gen
features_verified.notifications: ✓ Bell shows count, panel opens, dismiss works, clear all works
features_verified.closing_flow_modal: ✓ Steps with checkmarks, Send button, Settings gear, schedule dates
features_verified.pipeline_settings: ✓ Add/remove days, add/remove email/SMS actions, save per salesperson
features_verified.add_interaction: ✓ Type selector (Call/SMS/Email), description, mic button, translate button
features_verified.admin_commission_rules: ✓ 5 editable tiers, 7 SPIFFs with options, Add Tier/Option buttons
features_verified.admin_overview: ✓ Company Totals, Lead Status pie, Equipment charts
features_verified.mobile_responsive: ✓ All action buttons visible on mobile Pipeline view
features_verified.confetti_celebration: ✓ Works on sale confirmation - colorful confetti with toast

under_book_self_gen.issue: self_gen SPIFF was being locked on Under Book tier when it should remain available
